[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011011 5
1 1111011 6
2 0011001 3
3 1111111 a
4 0111000 3
5 0101011 4
6 1011010 4
7 1100010 3

01 10 0011000 2
12 21 0111000 3 match 4
23 32 0101000 2
34 43 0001010 2
45 54 1000010 2
56 65 0000000 a
67 76 0001001 2
70 07 0011000 2

02 20 0011000 2
13 31 0101011 4 match 5
24 42 0011000 2
35 53 0100010 2
46 64 0001000 1
57 75 1100010 3 match 7
60 06 0001000 1
71 17 0111011 5

03 30 0001000 1
14 41 0011010 3
25 52 0100000 1
36 63 0001001 2
47 74 1011010 4 match 6
50 05 0000000 a
61 16 0001001 2
72 27 0111000 3 match 4

04 40 0011000 2
15 51 0100010 2
26 62 0001000 1
37 73 0101011 4 match 5
[completion]
